history.note: shipped by dev-loop real run #1; orchestrator timed out before parsing result, manually reconciled

shipped by dev-loop run #24983649832 (commit eb84fbf, design-baseline + visual review); orchestrator marked shipped:false because DEVLOOP_RESULT line missing from stdout, then 5 subsequent retry runs all crashed (claude exited null) on the same item. Manually reconciled 2026-04-28; root cause of the null exit pattern to be investigated before tonight's session.
manual dev — no LLM, hermetic spec-vs-code classifier
manual dev — answer-keys live retrieval enriched with merged-PR removed-blockers; 13 new tests
manual dev — active failure-catalog gating (deterministic post-deliberation gate); 11 new tests
manual dev — per-repo blocker-vs-nit calibration (override auto-tracking + step-function demote/skip); 17 new tests
manual dev — diff splitter for large PRs (>500 lines bin-packed into chunks + integrated verdicts); 15 new tests
manual dev — agent-score-weighted reject routing (low-score agent's reject demoted to rework); 14 new tests. H2 complete!
manual QA — H2 pipeline integration test caught 2 calibration round-trip bugs (free-form vs enum category mismatch); fixed gate to use seedBlocker.category. 3 new integration tests.
manual dev — autofix patches → answer-keys on merge (sidecar handoff + per-(blocker, patch) answer-key); 10 new tests
manual dev — rework-loop bail → failure-catalog (writeReworkLoopFailure helper + autofix wiring); 7 new tests
manual dev — worker prompt auto-tunes from past bails (extractPriorBailHints + cache-prefix section); 13 new tests
manual dev — federation auto-push on record-outcome (autoPushOutcome helper + record-outcome wiring); 8 new tests
manual dev — catch-regression detector + meta-loop alerts (detectCatchRegressions + writeCatchRegression + review wiring); 10 new tests. H3 complete!

fullchain on-disk integration tests for H2 #6 → H3 #15 (35 tests across 10 files). Found 2 production-impacting bugs that hermetic unit tests missed: (1) failure-gate alreadyCoveredByCouncil keyed by enum vs free-form category — duplicate stickies (commit 9cdad27); (2) sidecar cycleNumber off-by-one between autofix writer and review reader — every autofix→answer-key handoff was a silent no-op pre-fix (commit 692fa77).

user-perspective integration audits (96 tests across 12 files: B.1 init, B.2 review-e2e, B.3 multi-PR self-evolve, B.4abc deploy/notif/cycle guards, B.5 npm package, B.6 doctor, B.7 secret isolation, B.8 budget, B.9 design domain, B.10 audit, B.11 federation HTTP, B.12 error UX). Found 4 production safety gaps: deploy-guard absent (5ebd3b8), notification-ledger absent (5ebd3b8), classifier polluted catalog with derivative-agent stickies — silent O(N) growth (5ebd3b8), notif-ledger leaked anomalous episodicId verbatim (0edc43a).

operational issues root-cause closure (53 tests across 6 files). OP-1 dev-loop null-exit diagnostic (5-way classifier + maxBuffer 50→200MB) — direct cause of cron-disable resolved. OP-2 per-item retry ceiling — H1.5 B-style 5-retry-on-same-item now hard-stops at 3. OP-3 workflow YAML contract (review/rework/merge.yml + dispatch types + skip-guard ordering + lockstep cli-version). OP-4 workflow ↔ central-plane route shape contract. OP-5 secret-guard E2E on autofix patches. OP-6 episodic anchor concurrency + UPSERT idempotency. Phase A+B+OP grand total: 184 integration tests, 7 production bugs fixed.
